pp-daemon._comment: Engineering squad. Wired to the pair-programmer harness daemon.

pp-codex._comment: Hydra judge plane: cross-vendor critique via PP's pp_codex MCP server. Wraps the `codex` CLI.

pp-gemini._comment: Hydra judge plane: cross-vendor critique via PP's pp_gemini MCP server. Wraps the `gemini` CLI.

hydra-memory._comment: Hydra memory fabric — episodic + semantic store as MCP resources. cwd is absolute (not ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}) because this file is loaded when Claude Code opens the Hydra source tree directly, NOT as a plugin — in that mode ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} resolves empty and `python -m mcp_servers.hydra_memory` fails ModuleNotFoundError before server.py's sys.path.insert can run. The plugin-cache copy at ~/.claude/plugins/cache/hydra-local/hydra/0.1.2/.mcp.json correctly keeps ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} for the plugin-mounted load path.

executive-suite._comment: Executive squad — thin MCP over the ExecutiveSuite pack (roster, skills, commands, output persistence). Absolute cwd: same reason as hydra-memory above.

rlm-creative._comment: Garland Crown — Eight Garland Heads studio. Thin MCP over RLM-Creative (skills, commands, agents, output persistence). Repointed from RLM-CLI-Starter on 2026-05-19 when the Garland Crown source pack shipped. Absolute cwd: same reason as hydra-memory above.

eights._comment: TheEights substrate — constitution attestation, envelope-record ledger, evolution-proposal queue, HITL request mirror, redaction helper. Hydra calls into this via hydra_core.eights.attestation.EightsAttestor; durable payloads spool to ~/.hydra/eights-pending/ when this server is unreachable (B8) and replay on next workflow start. AgentSmith ALSO talks to TheEights via its own bridge child process; both paths are valid. Server slug matches TheEights/.mcp.json.example so /mcp reconnect can find it. Singleton-guarded as of D2b — second spawn refuses cleanly with stderr diagnostic.
eights._eights_skip_audit_check_comment: EIGHTS_SKIP_AUDIT_CHECK=1 lets the daemon boot despite a broken audit-chain row. Set on 2026-05-21 because the dual-spawn race (pre-D2b singleton guard) corrupted the chain at row 1337 — see ~/.eights/logs/eights-daemon-<date>.log. REMOVE THIS ENV VAR after the audit chain is repaired (rebuild from ~/.eights/events/*.jsonl). Leaving it set permanently masks future chain corruption from being surfaced.
